name: Mexican Rice
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Green pepper; diced (more if desired)
1/2 cup Corn, frozen or canned (more if desired)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, mix the V-8 juice, water, chili powder, and dried minced onion.
2. Slowly bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
3. Add the rice, diced green pepper, and corn to the saucepan.
4. Cover and turn the heat to low.
5. Simmer for 25-30 minutes, stirring once during cooking time. The cooking time may vary slightly depending on the amount of vegetables added.
6. Allow to cool completely before serving.
